languages.text: {n}Обезображенное ожогом лицо Янура сияет улыбкой, а на броне появилось еще несколько пробоин.{/n} "Ваша Светлость, наступление отбито!"
{n}Janur's burn-scarred face beams with a smile, though his armour is now riddled with a few more holes.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, the attack has been repelled."
languages.original_text: {n}Обезображенное ожогом лицо Янура сияет улыбкой, а на броне появилось еще несколько пробоин.{/n} "Ваша Светлость, наступление отбито!"

traits.locale_text: {n}Janur's burn-scarred face beams with a smile, his armour now riddled with a few more holes.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, the attack has been repelled."
{n}Janur's burn-scarred face beams with a smile, though his armour is now riddled with a few more holes.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, the attack has been repelled."

{n}Janur has changed little since your meeting on the landing pad, except you notice new long scratches on his armour, and the rips in his uniform have been replaced with scarlet-stained bandages.{/n} "Lord Captain, the attack has been repelled."
{n}Janur's burn-scarred face beams with a smile, his armour now riddled with a few more holes.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, the attack has been repelled."
{n}Janur's burn-scarred face beams with a smile, though his armour is now riddled with a few more holes.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, the attack has been repelled."

languages.text: {n}ジャヌールは着陸パッドで会ったときからほとんど変わらない。ただ、鎧には新たな長い傷跡が走り、制服の裂け目は深紅に染まった包帯に替わっているのが目に入る。{/n}「ロードキャプテン、攻撃は撃退しました」
languages.original_text: {n}Janur has changed little since your meeting on the landing pad, except you notice new long scratches on his armour, and the rips in his uniform have been replaced with scarlet-stained bandages.{/n} "Lord Captain, the attack has been repelled."

traits.locale_text: {n}ジャヌールは着陸パッドで会ったときからほとんど変わらない。ただ、鎧には新たな長い傷跡が走り、制服の裂け目は深紅に染まった包帯に替わっているのが目に入る。{/n}「ロードキャプテン、攻撃は撃退しました。」

languages.text: {n}Un grand sourire illumine le visage brûlé de Janur, bien que quelques trous supplémentaires percent son armure.{/n} « Votre Seigneurie, nous avons réussi à repousser l'attaque. »
languages.original_text: {n}Janur's burn-scarred face beams with a smile, though his armour is now riddled with a few more holes.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, the attack has been repelled."

traits.locale_text: {n}Un grand sourire illumine le visage brûlé de Janur, bien que quelques trous supplémentaires percent son armure.{/n} « Votre Seigneurie, nous avons réussi à repousser l'attaque. »

languages.text: {n}Janur'un yanık izleriyle dolu yüzünde bir gülümseme parlıyor, gerçi zırhı artık birkaç delikle daha deşilmiş durumda.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, saldırı püskürtüldü."
languages.original_text: {n}Janur's burn-scarred face beams with a smile, though his armour is now riddled with a few more holes.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, the attack has been repelled."

traits.locale_text: {n}Janur'un yanık izleriyle dolu yüzünde bir gülümseme parlıyor, gerçi zırhı artık birkaç delikle daha deşilmiş durumda.{/n} "{mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, saldırı püskürtüldü."

languages.text: {n}Janur lächelt dich mit seinem verbrannten Gesicht an, obwohl seine Rüstung jetzt einige Löcher mehr aufweist.{/n} "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, der Angriff wurde zurückgeschlagen."
languages.original_text: {n}Janur's burn-scarred face beams with a smile, though his armour is now riddled with a few more holes.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, the attack has been repelled."

traits.locale_text: {n}Janur lächelt dich mit seinem verbrannten Gesicht an, obwohl seine Rüstung jetzt einige Löcher mehr aufweist.{/n} "Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, der Angriff wurde zurückgeschlagen."

languages.text: {n}El rostro de Janur, con sus quemaduras cicatrizadas, se ilumina con una sonrisa, a pesar de que su armadura cuenta ahora con unos agujeros más.{/n} «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, hemos rechazado el ataque».
languages.original_text: {n}Janur's burn-scarred face beams with a smile, though his armour is now riddled with a few more holes.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, the attack has been repelled."

traits.locale_text: {n}El rostro de Janur, con sus quemaduras cicatrizadas, se ilumina con una sonrisa, a pesar de que su armadura cuenta ahora con unos agujeros más.{/n} «Mi{mf|lord|lady}, hemos rechazado el ataque».

languages.text: {n}雅努尔那张布满灼痕的面庞绽放出笑容，尽管他护甲上又新添了好几个窟窿。{/n}“大人，进攻已经被击退了。”
languages.original_text: {n}Janur's burn-scarred face beams with a smile, though his armour is now riddled with a few more holes.{/n} "Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, the attack has been repelled."
